title: Double Trouble ADHD
subtitle: Chaotic & Loved
description: Because one ADHD brain is never enough! This hilarious design celebrates the double dose of chaos, creativity, and unstoppable energy that comes with having a wild ADHD mind. Featuring twin brain characters surrounded by lightning bolts, circles, and playful chaos - perfect for those who know their brain works in overdrive 24/7. The vibrant pink, red, and yellow gradient background radiates the electric energy of a double-trouble ADHD brain. Wear it loud and proud - your chaos is your superpower!
mockupPrompt: Product mockup on a black hoodie, professional studio lighting, the hoodie features a bold design with two cartoon brain characters in pink and yellow colors, surrounded by chaotic shapes like circles, lightning bolts, and stars. The text 'DOUBLE TROUBLE ADHD' in large bold white letters with a glow effect. The background is a vibrant pink-to-yellow gradient. The hoodie is displayed on a mannequin against a neutral gray backdrop, shot from the front at eye level, high resolution, commercial product photography
targetAudience: ADHD individuals who embrace chaos, neurodivergent folks with a sense of humor about their brain, people who love their wild minds
